name: gedeon-construct
description: The Gedeon Construct — a Claude Code operating system for AI-assisted software development.

plugins.name: gedeon-construct
plugins.description: gc-* skills: 8-stage pipeline, project lifecycle, specialist modes, and self-improvement loop.

skills.name: gc-pipeline
skills.description: Overview of the Gedeon Construct pipeline — all stages, iteration rules, and hand-offs

skills.name: gc-bootstrap
skills.description: Stage 1: workspace scan and situational awareness brief

skills.name: gc-discuss
skills.description: Stage 1.5 (optional): requirements elicitation, writes CONTEXT.md

skills.name: gc-plan
skills.description: Stage 2: 3 parallel explorers → evidence merge → Cynefin-tagged plan

skills.name: gc-preflight
skills.description: Stage 3: parallel plan audit with pessimistic confidence score

skills.name: gc-execute
skills.description: Stage 4: wave-based parallel execution with closed-loop verification

skills.name: gc-review
skills.description: Stage 5: multi-reviewer code review panel, security mandatory

skills.name: gc-eop
skills.description: Stage 6 (terminal): extract learnings to memory, write session digest

skills.name: gc-resume
skills.description: Pipeline recovery: reads gc-pipeline.json + artifact ladder, builds Recovery Brief, dispatches to correct stage

skills.name: gc-new-project
skills.description: Initialize .construct/ tree for a new project

skills.name: gc-milestone
skills.description: Add a milestone to ROADMAP.md

skills.name: gc-progress
skills.description: Show project completion status from .construct/ files

skills.name: gc-ship
skills.description: Create a PR via gh pr create to ship completed work

skills.name: gc-cynefin
skills.description: Classify problems using Cynefin before solving

skills.name: gc-probe
skills.description: Replace assumptions with evidence — foundational behavior rule

skills.name: gc-platform-review
skills.description: Review platform designs against Hohpe Platform Strategy principles

skills.name: gc-uiux
skills.description: Activate UI/UX design + implementation mode (taste-aware, distinctive not templated)

skills.name: gc-uiux-review
skills.description: Visual/UX/taste audit of rendered interfaces (complements gc-review)

skills.name: gc-shebang
skills.description: Generate or update @ai-rules headers at the top of code files

skills.name: gc-debug
skills.description: Scientific debugging: hypothesis → probe → fix → verify

skills.name: gc-skill-author
skills.description: Write or amend gc-* skills using Darwin HOW-not-WHAT principles

skills.name: gc-note
skills.description: Append a quick note or idea to .construct/NOTES.md

skills.name: gc-branch
skills.description: GitHub branching strategy advisor — detects team size and prescribes solo/small-team/full-team model

skills.name: gc-correct
skills.description: End-of-session behavioral gap capture and skill patching

skills.name: gc-update
skills.description: Update an existing install to the latest published version

skills.name: gc-contribute
skills.description: Files a GitHub Issue against the public repo for a raw idea or a locally-proven gc-correct patch
